candidate_scores.reason: best first response when repeated negative windows need earlier caution/halt hysteresis without breaking sell/unwind reachability
targets grid/min-order/risk-budget pressure by pausing BUY legs in bad regimes while preserving SELL/unwind
candidate entry-quality gate for range/choppy windows; must stay shadow/offline until replay proves edge

acceptance.safety: 0 rejected orders, 0 restarts, no exchange backoff
acceptance.risk: allocation remains bounded and sell/unwind stays reachable
acceptance.quality: improves daily net or max drawdown versus current baseline in replay

next_action: implement offline comparison for ranked candidate families before any runtime strategy patch
